text: I feel a quiet thrill, entering this luminous and modern space. The blue glow behind the glass hints at secrets—places where innovation and curiosity are celebrated. Inside, the vibrant wall marked 'R+D' (Research + Development) surrounds me, inviting reflection. My own thoughts seem to merge with the themes on display: human imagination, our ever-deepening engagement with technology, and the poetic possibilities sparked by new ideas. There’s anticipation, and also humility—standing at the threshold of what we have yet to know.
